docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $810.00 FILED BY BREEN, AILEEN AS TO DEFENDANT THE TRAVELERS DENTAL PLAN/ATTN: ARLINGTON,VICTORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-1995 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
